    intro i j
    by_cases hij : i = j
    · subst hij
      convert integral_eval_pi (i := i) (f := fun x ↦ x ^ 2) ?_ using 1
      · simp only [sq]; rfl
      · simp [integral_sq_gaussianReal]
      · infer_instance
      · rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]
        exact memLp_sq_gaussianReal
    · sorry
  simp_rw [h_prod]
  simp only [ite_mul, one_mul, zero_mul]
  conv_lhs =>
    congr
    ext i
    rw [Finset.sum_ite_eq]
    simp
  simp [sq]
